diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Schizoaffective Disorder, Bipolar Type, with psychotic features
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient has a long history of severe manic episodes and a diagnosis of bipolar disorder type I. Recent hospitalization due to concerns about developing mania in the context of non-compliance with medications indicates a worsening of symptoms, including poor insight/judgment and erotic delusions. The positive response to clozapine also supports the diagnosis of schizoaffective disorder with psychotic features.
